message:
fix(test): relax P99 event dispatch latency budget for debug builds

Adjust the P99 latency budget constant in event_dispatch_latency tests
to account for debug build overhead:

- Debug builds (cfg!(debug_assertions)): 200ms budget — debug binaries
  have ~10-50x overhead from bounds checks, no inlining, and unoptimized
  code generation
- Release builds: 5ms budget (unchanged) — the actual production target

This prevents spurious test failures when running cargo test without
--release, while keeping the tight 5ms budget for release-mode CI gates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
